subcodes.first_line: The path is manifest and the Cause is evident, and the banner bearing "There is none other God but Him" hath been hoisted upon the most exalted heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: راه پیدا و امر هویدا و رایت انه لا اله الا هو بر اعلی المقام منصوب و خباء
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
